name: Blackbaud Nonprofit CRM & Fundraising API
what_it_does: Blackbaud REST API for nonprofit CRM and fundraising platform (Raiser's Edge NXT, Financial Edge NXT, Altru). Enables AI agents to manage constituent and donor profile management, handle gift and donation processing and tracking, access fundraising campaign and appeal management, retrieve grant management and reporting data, manage event and ticket management workflows, handle volunteer management and engagement, access financial accounting and general ledger data, retrieve prospect research and major gift tracking, manage membership and subscription management, and integrate nonprofit data with fundraising, accounting, and analytics systems.
use_cases: Managing donor and constituent data from nonprofit CRM automation agents
Processing donations and gift tracking from fundraising automation agents
Retrieving grant and major gift data from development operations agents
Integrating nonprofit CRM with financial systems from accounting automation agents
not_for: For-profit businesses without nonprofit fundraising and donor management needs
Small nonprofits without enterprise CRM and fundraising platform budget
Consumer donation platforms without institutional nonprofit management
best_when: A nonprofit, university, hospital, or arts organization using Blackbaud Raiser's Edge NXT or Financial Edge NXT wants AI agents to automate donor engagement, gift processing, grant management, event management, and accounting integration.
avoid_when: PRIVACY+COMPLIANCE: Donor and constituent data is highly sensitive — PII, giving history, wealth screening data. Automated donation processing must comply with PCI-DSS. Gift acceptance policies and charitable deduction records require accuracy. Constituent data sharing with third parties may violate donor privacy expectations and GDPR.

auth.notes: Blackbaud uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Application-level credentials with constituent, gift, and accounting scopes. Blackbaud Developer portal with comprehensive API documentation. Webhooks for constituent and gift events. SKY API is the modern REST API surface for Raiser's Edge NXT and Financial Edge NXT.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — nonprofit software subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and module subscription; Raiser's Edge NXT, Financial Edge NXT, Altru modules
pricing.notes: Charleston, South Carolina. NASDAQ: BLKB. Founded 1981. Dominant nonprofit CRM and fundraising platform. $1B+ annual revenue. 45,000+ nonprofit customers globally. Used by American Red Cross, Harvard University, and The Metropolitan Museum of Art. Acquired JustGiving, YourCause, and others. Competes with Salesforce NPSP for nonprofit CRM.

performance.rate_limits: SKY API: rate limits per OAuth application; bulk export throttled

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Constituent and donor data is highly sensitive — wealth screening and giving history must not be shared without consent
PCI-DSS for donation payment processing — automated gift entry must not handle raw card data
No public MCP server — OAuth2 SKY API with Blackbaud Developer portal
SKY API is NXT products only — legacy Raiser's Edge (non-NXT) uses different API; verify customer version
Gift acceptance policies vary by organization — automated gift entry must respect fund restrictions and gift types
Charitable deduction records must be accurate — gift records used for donor tax receipts; errors create compliance risk
agent_readiness.security_notes: Nonprofit donor and financial data. SOC2, PCI-DSS, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/AU data residency. Donor PII and giving history sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Nonprofit CRM and fundraising data. SOC2, PCI-DSS, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Donor PII and charitable giving records.
